bio: Solana core contributor and developer advocate. Building on Solana since 2021. Previously worked at Serum and Marinade Finance. Passionate about onboarding the next wave of Web3 developers in Latin America.
name: Ana Santos

bio: Systems programmer and Rust educator. Former embedded systems engineer who transitioned to blockchain development. Maintains open-source Solana tooling and teaches Rust workshops across Latin America.
name: Lucas Oliveira

bio: Anchor framework contributor and smart contract auditor. Leads the Solana security guild at Superteam Brazil. Has audited 20+ Solana programs including major DeFi protocols.
name: Mariana Costa

bio: DeFi researcher and protocol designer. Previously built trading systems at a São Paulo quant fund. Now designs tokenomics and DeFi primitives for Solana protocols.
name: Rafael Mendes
